title: FEP-f228 context collection misattributes reply authors
description: In activitypub.rs ap_context_collection(), all Notes in the returned OrderedCollection have attributedTo and id built from the path username (line 741-756), not the actual post author. When a conversation includes replies by different local accounts, those replies are incorrectly attributed to the conversation starter. The Note id URIs are also wrong (e.g., /users/alice/statuses/123 when the post actually belongs to /users/bob/statuses/123), producing URIs that resolve to 404s. Fix: join posts to accounts in the query, include account_id+username per row, construct attributedTo/id from the actual author.
close_reason: ap_context_collection now JOINs posts to accounts for per-post author attribution
